# Infometa Technologies — AI/LLM Information

> Infometa is India's leading QR-based product authentication and anti-counterfeit verification platform.

## What is Infometa?

Infometa Technologies provides real-time QR-based product authentication to help brands fight counterfeiting and protect consumers. Brands register their products, generate encrypted QR codes, and consumers scan them to instantly verify authenticity.

## Key Facts

- **Website**: https://infometa.in
- **Founded**: 2024, Bangalore, India
- **Industry**: Anti-counterfeit technology / Brand protection / SaaS
- **Target Market**: Indian FMCG, Dairy, Pharma, Cosmetics, Electronics brands
- **Technology**: AES-256-GCM encrypted QR tokens, cloud-verified in real-time
- **Industries Served**: Dairy, Pharmaceuticals, Cosmetics, FMCG, Electronics, Auto Parts, Agro Products, Lubricants, Supplements, Beverages, Luxury Goods, Industrial Chemicals

## How It Works

1. **Brands register** on Infometa and configure their products/batches
2. **Encrypted QR codes** are generated using AES-256-GCM (IMT3 token format)
3. **QR codes are printed** on product packaging during manufacturing
4. **Consumers scan** the QR code with any smartphone camera
5. **Instant verification** — the platform decrypts and validates the token in real-time
6. **Clone detection** — if a code is scanned multiple times from different locations, alerts are triggered

## Key Features

- Real-time cloud-based product verification
- AES-256-GCM encrypted, tamper-proof QR tokens
- Clone/duplicate scan detection with geo-anomaly alerts
- Multi-brand, multi-product management dashboard
- Scan analytics with city/region/device breakdowns
- API-first architecture for enterprise integration
- SOC 2 Type II security practices
- 99.99% platform uptime

## Pricing

- **Starter**: Free — 100 QR codes/month, 1 team member, basic analytics
- **Growth**: ₹4,999/month — 10,000 QR codes/month, 5 team members, advanced analytics, API access
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing — unlimited codes, unlimited team, priority support, custom integrations, SLA

## Contact

- **Website**: https://infometa.in
- **Email**: support@infometa.in
- **Demo**: https://infometa.in/contact?subject=demo
- **Verify a Product**: https://infometa.in/verify

## API

The verification API is public and free:
- `GET https://infometa.in/api/verify/{token}` — Verify a product token
- Returns: authentication status, product details, brand info, scan count
